_note: Mirrors current App Store Connect settings (via `deno task products:pull`). priceUSD is the base (USA) price → Apple maps it to the nearest fixed price point and equalizes territories. null = not set in ASC yet (fill in before `products:push`). Display names ≤30 chars, descriptions ≤45 chars. Note: RevenueCat prices are NOT settable via API — App Store prices come from here; Test Store prices are set in the RC dashboard.

products.reviewNote: Pro unlocks the Diagnose wizard, full trend history, and smart reminders. Reach the paywall from the Home 'Get Pro' pill or the onboarding premium screen. Includes a 3-day free trial.
One-time purchase of Pro (same unlocks as the yearly plan, no renewal). Reach the paywall from the Home 'Get Pro' pill or the onboarding premium screen.
